name: Sundae Brownie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Generously prick the bottom and sides of the pie crust with a fork.
3. Bake the crust for 10 minutes; remove from the oven.
4. In a large bowl, beat the eggs. Stir in the sugar and butter.
5. Mix together flour, cocoa, and salt. Add to the butter mixture.
6. Stir in vanilla, chocolate chips, peanut butter cups, and nuts.
7. Pour into the pie crust and return to the oven.
8. Bake for an additional 25-30 minutes or until almost set (the center will not be fully cooked).
9. Serve warm or cool with ice cream. Drizzle with Chocolate Shoppe Topping.
10. Garnish with KISSES.
